title: [phase:critique] [family:backend-fit] [provider_hint:codex] Return one concise line with your initial critique of using Google AI agent tooling as the main backend for Cursorvers.Inc. Findings first, one or two sentences only.
summary_text: Record at least these items so completion is auditable: - **Scope implemented**: `line-webhook` now routes prompt/risk through wrappers (`runPromptPolisherWrapper`, `runRiskCheckerWrapper`) in [index.ts](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/line-webhook/index.ts), with command routing/limits centralized via `routeToolCommand` and `getEffectiveInputLimit` in [webhook-utils.ts](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/line-webhook/webhook-utils.ts). - **Contract alignment**: failure messaging now uses wrapper contract (`userError`) at the call site in [index.ts](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/line-webhook/index.ts), and wrapper facade uses utility-level keyword detection in [cursorvers-wrapper-facade.ts](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/_shared/cursorvers-wrapper-facade.ts). - **Verification evidence**: exact command and result: `deno task test:functions` => `606 passed, 0 failed, 2 ignored` (record date/time and branch/commit SHA). - **Targeted regression coverage**: note that parsing/routing seam tests exist in [webhook-utils_test.ts](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/line-webhook/webhook-utils_test.ts) including precedence, empty suffix handling, and explicit `check:`/`polish:` flows. - **Known non-blocking follow-ups**: 1. Add one thin dispatcher integration test for `handleEvent -> routeToolCommand` wiring (current heavy coverage is seam-level). 2. Remove remaining keyword-detection duplication between [diagnosis-handlers.ts](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/line-webhook/lib/diagnosis-handlers.ts) and [webhook-utils.ts](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/line-webhook/webhook-utils.ts). 3. Update docs/badges still referencing `test-line-webhook.yml` (file does not exist) in [README.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/README.md) and [line-webhook test README](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cursorvers_line_free_dev/supabase/functions/line-webhook/test/README.md).
